text:
Fullmetal Alchemist Original Soundtrack 2 is a soundtrack album containing music from the first Fullmetal Alchemist anime series.

Tracklist

Ready Steady Go! (READY STEADY GO)
Tenderness (恩愛)
Sin (罪)
Courageous Fight (敢闘)
Homunculus (ホムンクルス)
Solitude (孤独)
Pointless Argument (空転)
Remnants (残滓)
Loneliness (寥々)
Lust (春情)
Pulse (脈動)
Life and Death (死生)
Great Speed (神速)
Greed (強欲)
The Thread of Life (命脈)
Transient Life (露命)
Resentment (悲憤)
Inspiration (感奮)
Emptiness (空虚)
Horizon (天涯)
Immortality (無窮)
Eternity (久遠)
Gorgeousness (絢爛)
Deep Forest (深い森)
Dante (ダンテ)
Precautionary Rules (戒飭)
Revelation (啓示)
Patriotism (憂国)
Reflection (追想)
Tobira No Muko He (扉の向こうへ)

Notes

Track 1: lyrics by hyde, composed by tetsu, arranged by L'Arc~en~Ciel & Hajime Okano, performed by L'Arc~en~Ciel
Track 30: composed by Kosuke Morimoto, arranged by Seiko Nagaoka, lyrics and performed by YeLLOW Generation
Tracks 2-29: composed and arranged by Michiru Oshima
